channel.title: MotherDuck Status
channel.description: Degraded EU Region Database Load Times

item.title: [Detected] Degraded experience using Dives
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
For some customers, Dives may not load properly, with a stuck page that says "Waiting for sandbox...". This is due to a caching issue. This issue will likely disappear on its own as your browser cache invalidates naturally.
But while we've fixed the issue upstream, you might encounter it...

item.title: [Detected] Degraded experience using Dives
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
No new updates.

item.title: [Resolved] Degraded experience using Dives
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
At this point, all major browsers should invalidate the old cache for the MotherDuck UI. If you are having a problem accessing your Dives, please contact us.

item.title: [Investigating] Degraded EU Region Database Load Times
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We are currently experiencing a service disruption on the EU region where database load times are degraded. Our team is investigating and will update as soon as we learn more.
Apologies for any inconvenience.

item.title: [Investigating] Degraded EU Region Database Load Times
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We're continuing to investigate this issue.

item.title: [Investigating] Degraded EU Region Database Load Times
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We are still investigating the degraded database load times in the EU Region. Our team continues to work on fixing it with high urgency.

item.title: [Investigating] Degraded EU Region Database Load Times
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We continue working on fixing this issue.

item.title: [Investigating] Some databases are failing to load
item.description: Some users are experiencing a degradation of service because a subset of databases are failing to load. We are investigating.

item.title: [Investigating] Some databases are failing to load
item.description: We have identified the root cause and are working on implementing a fix

item.title: [Resolved] Some databases are failing to load
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
Databases are loading as expected after deploying the fix. We are actively monitoring the health of the service.

item.title: [Investigating] MotherDuck databases unavailable in us-east-1
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We are currently experiencing a US East 1 service disruption where databases are unable to be opened and snapshotted. This impacts both existing and new connections. Share updates may also be impacted. Our team is investigating and will update as soon as we learn more.
We will provide...

item.title: [Investigating] MotherDuck databases unavailable in us-east-1
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We have identified the root cause of this incident and are implementing a fix.

item.title: [Resolved] MotherDuck databases unavailable in us-east-1
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
This incident has been resolved. All databases are available.

item.title: [Detected] users unable to save new dives; some existing dives also affected
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
Our internal monitors have detected an increase in server-side error messages immediately following a release. We are currently investigating the issue. So far a limited number of customers appear to be affected but the full impact is unknown.

item.title: [Investigating] users unable to save new dives; some existing dives also affected
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
Following a code release at approximately 23:00 UTC, most customers are unable to create new dives and may experience errors when loading existing dives. We are continuing to investigate the root cause.

item.title: [Investigating] users unable to save new dives; some existing dives also affected
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We believe we have identified the root cause and are working to validate a fix. We believe the fix will be deployed within 2 hours.

item.title: [Resolved] users unable to save new dives; some existing dives also affected
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
This incident has been resolved.

item.title: [Investigating] MotherDuck Remote MCP Server is currently unavailable
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
The MotherDuck remote MCP server is currently unavailable, we are investigating the issue.

item.title: [Resolved] MotherDuck Remote MCP Server is currently unavailable
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
This issue has been resolved, the MCP server is available.
